steps.title: Find the discount
steps.content:
A $20\%$ reduction on a $50$ dollar jacket means subtracting $20\%$ of $50$.
$$0.20(50)=10$$
The discount is $10$ dollars.

steps.title: Subtract from the original price
steps.content:
Subtract the discount from the original price.
$$50-10=40$$
The sale price is $40$, which matches choice D. The answer is D.
